name: Reflex Plus Maxi Breed Dog Food Lamb & Rice 18kg
shortDescription: Reflex Plus Maxi Breed Adult Dog Food Lamb & Rice offers tailored nutrition for large dogs, ensuring strong muscles, joint flexibility, and long-lasting energy through a balanced blend of lamb protein and wholesome grains.
description: Processed Lamb Protein, Processed Animal Protein, Corn, Chicken Fat, Rice, Sugar Beet, Liver Flavor, Whey Powder, Vitamins and Minerals, Xylo-Oligosaccharides, Brewer's Yeast, Flaxseed, Salt, Yucca Schidigera, Preservatives - Antioxidants.
